title: scaevola cylindrica
intro: Scaevola cylindrica, also known as the Forster's sedge or cylinder fanflower, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Caledonia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its potential to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Scaevola cylindrica include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of skin irritations and infections. In herbal preparations, Scaevola cylindrica is often used in topical ointments and creams, as well as in tinctures and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
